name: QVC Group Inc. 8.0% Fixed Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: QVC Group Inc. 8.0% Fixed Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock is a preferred stock issued by QVC Group Inc., offering a fixed dividend rate of 8.0% and cumulative dividend payments. This security ranks higher than common stock in the event of liquidation. It is based in the USA.
